ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AION-TECH SOLUTIONS LIMITED has made a further Rs. 60 lakh cash investment in its wholly-owned subsidiary, ROQIT GREENFLEET DIGITAL SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED, increasing the total investment to Rs. 10.40 crore. While ROQIT operates in the high-potential EV and Hydrogen fleet technology sector, it has generated minimal revenue (Rs. 18.7 lakhs in FY26) since its December 2024 incorporation, indicating a substantial capital burn rate. This significant ongoing investment in a highly nascent venture with limited commercialization presents a material financial commitment and raises a red flag regarding the subsidiary's current revenue generation relative to its capital consumption.
